event_claims.description: Merger Sub will merge with and into the Company, with the Company surviving and becoming a wholly-owned subsidiary of G&W.

event_claims.description: The Company engaged GHF as its investment banking firm.
event_claims.quote_text: During the executive session of the Board’s regular quarterly meeting held on January 27, 2016

event_claims.description: The Board appointed a special committee of independent directors called the Transaction Committee to supervise and oversee the process and make a recommendation.
event_claims.quote_text: At a special meeting of the Board held on March 14, 2016

event_claims.description: Company management met with representatives of Party A.
event_claims.quote_text: On March 22, 2016 and March 23, 2016, Daniel T. Noreck (the Company’s Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer) and other members of the senior management team of the Company met with various representatives of Party A.

event_claims.description: Company management met with representatives of Party A.
event_claims.quote_text: On March 22, 2016 and March 23, 2016, Daniel T. Noreck (the Company’s Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer) and other members of the senior management team of the Company met with various representatives of Party A.

event_claims.description: The Transaction Committee authorized GHF to contact Party A and other potential buyers regarding interest in a change in control transaction.
event_claims.quote_text: The Transaction Committee authorized GHF to contact Party A as well as other potential buyers to determine their level of interest in a change in control transaction.

event_claims.description: GHF contacted 11 potential strategic buyers and 18 potential financial buyers.
event_claims.quote_text: representatives of GHF contacted 11 potential strategic buyers (including Party A) and 18 potential financial buyers

event_claims.actor_label: potential strategic buyers and potential financial buyers
event_claims.description: Each potential strategic buyer and 14 potential financial buyers executed confidentiality agreements.
event_claims.quote_text: Each of the potential strategic buyers and 14 potential financial buyers subsequently executed confidentiality agreements.

event_claims.description: The Company and GHF held an introductory meeting with Party B.
event_claims.quote_text: on April 21, 2016, the Company and representatives of GHF held an introductory meeting with another potential strategic buyer (“Party B”).

event_claims.description: Potential buyers that executed confidentiality agreements received a memorandum concerning the Company and its prospects.
event_claims.quote_text: distributed to the potential buyers, including Party A, Party B and G&W, that had executed confidentiality agreements

event_claims.description: Potential buyers were advised to submit non-binding indications of interest by May 10, 2016, later postponed to May 19, 2016.
event_claims.quote_text: each potential buyer had been advised to submit a non-binding indication of interest by May 10, 2016

event_claims.description: The deadline for non-binding indications of interest was postponed to May 19, 2016.
event_claims.quote_text: which deadline was subsequently postponed to May 19, 2016 to ensure the potential buyers had sufficient time to formulate their most compelling offers

event_claims.description: The Company received nine written indications of interest from potential buyers between May 19 and June 1, 2016.

event_claims.description: The Company received six letters of intent in late July 2016.
